top_signals.title: Trump will remain ‘patient’ in pursuit of a deal with Iran, says Hegseth
top_signals.summary: President wants to make a ‘great’ deal but defence secretary warns US is ready to restart attacks
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ChatGPT share links abused to host fake outage pages to deliver malware
top_signals.summary: Threat actors are abusing ChatGPT's content-sharing feature to display fake OpenAI outage pages that direct users to download malware disguised as the ChatGPT desktop application. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Pete Hegseth says US-China ties are ‘better than in years’ - Financial Times
top_signals.summary: Pete Hegseth says US-China ties are ‘better than in years’  Financial Times
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump to headline 250th anniversary fair opening after performers drop out
top_signals.summary: Organizers have not publicly detailed the reasons for the departures, though ⁠the exits have ​raised questions about the viability of the event as originally ​envisioned.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Court-ordered Circle freeze traps $12.6 million in Zama cUSDC contract amid Overnight Finance suit
top_signals.summary: Zama CEO Rand Hindi said the protocol's confidential USDC contract was "caught in a crossfire" and that his team is investigating the freeze.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon blasts Coinbase’s Brian Armstrong, plans to fight Clarity Act
top_signals.summary: Dimon said Coinbase's Armstrong is spending hundreds of millions of dollars trying to get Clarity Act passed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Google Chrome adds session cookie theft protection for all users
top_signals.summary: Google says the Chrome Device Bound Session Credentials (DBSC) security feature is now generally available and is rolling out to all users to prevent account takeovers. [...]
